lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਦਿ ਸਮਾਇਲੋ ਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿਲੇ ਦੇਵਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naad samaaeilo re satigur bhettile devaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meeting the Divine True Guru, I merge into the sound current of the Naad. ||1||Pause||
Where the dazzling white light is seen,
The jewels are in the treasure chamber of the heart-lotus.
there the unstruck sound current of the Shabad resounds.
One's light merges in the Light;
by Guru's Grace, I know this. ||2||
They sparkle and glitter like lightning.
He is totally permeating and pervading in my soul. ||3||
The Lord is near at hand, not far away.
Where the light of the undying sun shines,
Servant Naam Dayv is absorbed in the Celestial Lord. ||4||1||
By Guru's Grace, I know this.
the light of burning lamps seems insignificant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੋ ਪਹਿ ਦੁਗਣੀ ਮਜੂਰੀ ਦੈਹਉ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਬੇਢੀ ਦੇਹੁ ਬਤਾਈ ਹੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: to peh duganee majooree daihau mo kau bedtee dehu bataaee ho |1|
lines.english: I shall pay him double wages. Tell me, who is your carpenter?" ||1||
Fourth House, Sorat'h:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾੜ ਪੜੋਸਣਿ ਪੂਛਿ ਲੇ ਨਾਮਾ ਕਾ ਪਹਿ ਛਾਨਿ ਛਵਾਈ ਹੋ ॥
lines.translit: paarr parrosan poochh le naamaa kaa peh chhaan chhavaaee ho |
lines.english: The woman next door asked Naam Dayv, "Who built your house?

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੀ ਬਾਈ ਬੇਢੀ ਦੇਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: ree baaee bedtee den na jaaee |
lines.english: O sister, I cannot give this carpenter to you.
My carpenter is the Support of the breath of life. ||1||Pause||
Behold, my carpenter is pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਢੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਮਜੂਰੀ ਮਾਂਗੈ ਜਉ ਕੋਊ ਛਾਨਿ ਛਵਾਵੈ ਹੋ ॥
lines.translit: bedtee preet majooree maangai jau koaoo chhaan chhavaavai ho |
lines.english: This carpenter demands the wages of love, if someone wants Him to build their house.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਗ ਕੁਟੰਬ ਸਭਹੁ ਤੇ ਤੋਰੈ ਤਉ ਆਪਨ ਬੇਢੀ ਆਵੈ ਹੋ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: log kuttanb sabhahu te torai tau aapan bedtee aavai ho |2|
lines.english: When one breaks his ties with all the people and relatives, then the carpenter comes of His own accord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂੰਗੈ ਮਹਾ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸੁ ਚਾਖਿਆ ਪੂਛੇ ਕਹਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਹੋ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: goongai mahaa amrit ras chaakhiaa poochhe kehan na jaaee ho |3|
lines.english: The mute tastes the most sublime ambrosial nectar, but if you ask him to describe it, he cannot. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੋ ਬੇਢੀ ਬਰਨਿ ਨ ਸਾਕਉ ਸਭ ਅੰਤਰ ਸਭ ਠਾਂਈ ਹੋ ॥
lines.translit: aiso bedtee baran na saakau sabh antar sabh tthaanee ho |
lines.english: I cannot describe such a carpenter, who is contained in everything, everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਢੀ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਸੁਨਿ ਰੀ ਬਾਈ ਜਲਧਿ ਬਾਂਧਿ ਧ੍ਰੂ ਥਾਪਿਓ ਹੋ ॥
lines.translit: bedtee ke gun sun ree baaee jaladh baandh dhraoo thaapio ho |
lines.english: Listen to the virtues of this carpenter, O sister; He stopped the oceans, and established Dhroo as the pole star.
The skinless drum plays.
Sorat'h, Third House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੇ ਕੇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸੀਅ ਬਹੋਰੀ ਲੰਕ ਭਭੀਖਣ ਆਪਿਓ ਹੋ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: naame ke suaamee seea bahoree lank bhabheekhan aapio ho |4|2|
lines.english: Naam Dayv's Lord Master brought Sita back, and gave Sri Lanka to Bhabheekhan. ||4||2||
Without the rainy season, the clouds shake with thunder.
Without clouds, the rain falls,
if one contemplates the essence of reality. ||1||
Touching the philosopher's stone, I have been transformed into gold.
Meeting with Him, my body is made beauteous and sublime. ||1||Pause||
I have met my Beloved Lord.
I love Him as my own, and my doubt has been dispelled.
Seeking the Guru's guidance, my mind is content. ||2||
The water is contained within the pitcher;
I have threaded the jewels into my mouth and mind.
The mind of the disciple has faith in the Guru.
Servant Naam Dayv understands the essence of reality. ||3||3||
I know that the One Lord is contained in all.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੋਰਠਿ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਜੀ ਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: raag soratth baanee bhagat ravidaas jee kee |
lines.english: Raag Sorat'h, The Word Of Devotee Ravi Daas Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਹਮ ਹੋਤੇ ਤਬ ਤੂ ਨਾਹੀ ਅਬ ਤੂਹੀ ਮੈ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jab ham hote tab too naahee ab toohee mai naahee |
lines.english: When I am in my ego, then You are not with me. Now that You are with me, there is no egotism within me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਲ ਅਗਮ ਜੈਸੇ ਲਹਰਿ ਮਇ ਓਦਧਿ ਜਲ ਕੇਵਲ ਜਲ ਮਾਂਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anal agam jaise lehar me odadh jal keval jal maanhee |1|
lines.english: The wind may raise up huge waves in the vast ocean, but they are just water in water. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸਾ ਮਾਨੀਐ ਹੋਇ ਨ ਤੈਸਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaisaa maaneeai hoe na taisaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Things are not as they seem. ||1||Pause||
O Lord, what can I say about such an illusion?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਰਪਤਿ ਏਕੁ ਸਿੰਘਾਸਨਿ ਸੋਇਆ ਸੁਪਨੇ ਭਇਆ ਭਿਖਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: narapat ek singhaasan soeaa supane bheaa bhikhaaree |
lines.english: It is like the king, who falls asleep upon his throne, and dreams that he is a beggar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਛਤ ਰਾਜ ਬਿਛੁਰਤ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸੋ ਗਤਿ ਭਈ ਹਮਾਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: achhat raaj bichhurat dukh paaeaa so gat bhee hamaaree |2|
lines.english: His kingdom is intact, but separated from it, he suffers in sorrow. Such is my own condition. ||2||
